text: {"reason": "The draft asserts that reset emails come from \"noreply@novig.us (or whatever address the reset emails come from)\" \u2014 this is an independent assertion of a specific platform rule/feature (the sender address of reset emails) that is not in the allowed facts list. The hedged form \"or whatever\" does not cure the violation; the draft is still asserting the existence of a specific email sender address. This should be omitted or deferred to a human follow-up.", "violates": true}
